name: 🪓 KILL PARTY NOOB !! - REGRETEVATOR
description:
TAKE THE TOURGUIDE'S CHALLENGE!

NOTE 6/21

"Poob may be a difficult one to deal with. Of course, none of these challenges have a real deadline other than 'do it before somebody else does', so feel free to wait until the time is right. Poob is constantly in the public eye, throwing and going to parties, and when they aren't they're in places like the regretevator itself. You're going to have some trouble leading Poob away from the crowd without being noticed."
"But eventually, they, too, will die."
("In fact, I'm surprised you even requested for their file. I suppose cutting down an entire family tree has left you wanting someone more lighthearted to die? So that you wouldn't have to hear someone mourn?")

Poob needs to put more thought into the people they trust. While not exactly gullible, they are easy to please, and the partygoer's favorite activity is pleasing others as well. With an entire family wiped from the face of the regretevator, quite a few iindividuals are rather antsy. Poob, thinking you are one of these people, delivers a gift right at your doorstep, wanting to help you feel better like they did with others.

A perfect gift.

Seems the Tourguide didn't need to worry about you trying to get rid of Poob in a public space after all.

typing quirk breaks my shit sorry 😐

I DON'T CARE HOW YOU DO IT OR WHAT YOUR MOTIVATION IS, KILL POOB!!

I can't control what you do, but don't be weird.

feel free to request a regretevator character to be the next target!
creator: LeonBeSimping
